title: Greek Stifado with Lamb
description: A hearty and flavorful Greek stew made with tender lamb and a rich onion sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb pieces in batches on all sides, about 5 minutes per batch. Transfer the lamb to a plate and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and cook the onions until they are softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the stifado spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine and bring to a simmer, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, brown sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and falls apart easily.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
